ham.subject: Update on Company Leave Policy - Effective from 1st May 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope you are doing well. This email is to inform you about the updated leave policy that will be effective from 1st May 2026. Please note the following key changes:

1. Paid Leave Accrual – Employees will now accrue 1.5 days of paid leave for every month of continuous service.
2. Remote Working Days – Up to 2 remote working days per month will be allowed.
3. Public Holiday Adjustment – Public holidays falling on weekends will be shifted to the following working day.

How to Apply:
- Submit your leave request through the HR portal by the 5th of the month.
- Attach a brief reason for the leave.

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to HR at hr@company.com or call +91-9876543210.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best Regards,
HR Manager
